test.name: Test Utilisateur Valide____ ET Mot De Passe Vide

kw.name: Ouvrir le Navigateur Et Accéder A l'Application
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Un Message d'Erreur Doit Etre Visible Apres Une Connexion Incorrecte
Accéder A La Page De Connexion
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Vérifier Que Le Message D'Erreur Est Visible
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Not Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'css=#modal-login .error' does not contain exact text ''.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` does not contain exact the text ``not_expected``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.name: Le Tableau De Bord Doit Etre Visible Apres Une Connexion Réussie

kw.name: Ouvrir le Navigateur Et Accéder A l'Application
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Effectuer Une Connexion Avec Un Compte Valide
Accéder A La Page De Connexion
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Soumettre Le Formulaire De Connexion Et Acceder Au Tableau De Bord
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.name: Vérifier Que Le Tableau De Bord Est Visible
Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.msg: Page title is 'Tableau de bord - Livraison 3'.
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//a[contains(text(),'Se déconnecter') or contains(text(),'Log out') or contains(text(),'Déconnexion')]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.name: Le Lien De Connexion Devrait Etre Visible Après Une Déconnexion Réussie

kw.name: Ouvrir le Navigateur Et Accéder A l'Application
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Effectuer Une Connexion Avec Un Compte Valide
Accéder A La Page De Connexion
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Soumettre Le Formulaire De Connexion Et Acceder Au Tableau De Bord
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.name: Vérifier Que Le Tableau De Bord Est Visible
Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.msg: Page title is 'Tableau de bord - Livraison 3'.
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: Effectuer Une Déconnexion Réussie
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//a[contains(text(),'Se déconnecter') or contains(text(),'Log out') or contains(text(),'Déconnexion')]' not visible after 15 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
kw.status: Element 'xpath=//a[contains(text(),'Se déconnecter') or contains(text(),'Log out') or contains(text(),'Déconnexion')]' not visible after 15 seconds.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.status: Element 'xpath=//a[contains(text(),'Se déconnecter') or contains(text(),'Log out') or contains(text(),'Déconnexion')]' not visible after 15 seconds.

kw.name: Vérifier Que Le Lien De Connexion Est Visible
Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.status: Element 'xpath=//a[contains(text(),'Se déconnecter') or contains(text(),'Log out') or contains(text(),'Déconnexion')]' not visible after 15 seconds.
